title: Blood crystal
description: Adds items thats summon Enhanced Celestials moons
body:
Not a big mod, made in MCreator in 10 minutes, for the Nihonium modpack. This mod is an addon for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials), and deals with adding special items that summon EC moons.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1066371110167384064/Clipchamp_1.gif)

<details>
<summary>WIKI</summary>

<details>
<summary>Blood crystal</summary>

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290269241192539/bloodcrystal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=63dfecf21d8d502ed122bc188f5855a20ff4167af300af192b962973b8938ea0&)

To get this item, you have to kill a zombie (from vanilla Minecraft) and with a 5% chance it will drop.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Lucky crystal</summary>

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290269526409276/lucky_crystal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=c18cd0d0edd671040203561d363324fbbe0422f3d6481148cff1f27e0df7d432&)

To obtain this item, you need to break the sculk blocks and with a 0.05% chance it will drop. Don't worry, it's not the smallest chance, if I had set it to ~2% the crystal would drop, literally from every block.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Harvest crystal</summary>

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290268146479115/harvest_crysrtal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=a8b24d0232d22133e18a1b02496f63e89404e1b68c9f97b98fb273c2cdfdd0e4&)

This crystal must be purchased from a level 2 farmer.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103297064932212776/2023-05-03_18.35.25.png?ex=65f19bf6&is=65df26f6&hm=b0fb8124e98fe08352c8a57e135b690b877d0eef909d473b9520129d4b59870d&)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Unstable crystals</summary>

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290269782257685/unstable_blood_crystal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=99b53e0d4ece07cf4b28b6ddf6d869cc7be5e16d65811b5f56f3388443c627c5&)
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290268670763108/unstable_lucky_crystal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=cacc952210b9241da7161a439bc2629cbfb44b624686327c21ec6becccbf65f2&)
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103290268410724363/unstable_harvest_crysrtal.png?ex=65f195a2&is=65df20a2&hm=1ece632a089a7d5ade1b51878104dfbf199353b05eb24bb0d23dc8a2503d3e8f&)

Summoned Super moons.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103297065477484564/2023-05-03_19.04.45.png?ex=65f19bf6&is=65df26f6&hm=9e4f5012bd9e469e5ff839183be4c64fe8b5bd69f65f848ce7d57aca6ab7aa7c&)
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103297065729130527/2023-05-03_19.04.47.png?ex=65f19bf6&is=65df26f6&hm=3acb01e0b40900e1582f25c59dd5fb191707a9283fec7880905cda46aceba995&)
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014200166473023540/1103297066031136839/2023-05-03_19.04.49.png?ex=65f19bf6&is=65df26f6&hm=ebf6b8328a45916b2ca5e08a4a1cc6ca9d2c38b99458d38f2cd64a5cdd5f3c8f&)

</details>

</details>
